title: Permission-prompts baseline
description: Per-task permission-prompt counts captured against a *baseline harness* (the harness Atelier compares itself to in §8). The same schema records Atelier's own counts for comparison via tests/workload/runner/compare_baselines.py. The reference baseline harness for v0.1 is documented in spec §8 but the schema itself is vendor-neutral — any harness with a measurable prompt-count behaviour can use these slots.

baseline_harness_name.description: Identifier of the harness measured. Vendor-neutral by design. For the §8 calibration this is the name of whatever current harness is being treated as the reference baseline (Atelier's spec picks one — see spec §8). When recording Atelier's own numbers, use `"atelier"`.

baseline_harness_version.description: Version string for `baseline_harness_name`. Format is harness-specific.

model_id.description: Provider-qualified model identifier used during the run (e.g., `anthropic:claude-sonnet-4-6`, `openai:gpt-4.1`, `ollama:qwen2.5-coder:7b`). BYOM by design: the model is not constrained, only recorded.

reference_machine.description: Pointer to the spec at tests/perf/reference.md (e.g., 'reference.md@<git-sha>')

task_id.description: Matches a task ID in tests/workload/canonical/

runs.description: Per-run prompt counts; minimum 3 runs to compute median
